name: ELT Real-Time Dashboard
description: Real-time monitoring of ELT pipeline health, data quality, and capacity

tiles.title: Pipeline Success Rate (Last 24h)
tiles.query:
FabricPipelineRuns
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize SuccessRate = round(countif(Status == 'Succeeded') * 100.0 / count(), 2)

tiles.title: Rows Processed (Last Hour)
tiles.query:
FabricPipelineRuns
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize TotalRows = sum(RowsRead)

tiles.title: CU Consumption (Last 24h)
tiles.query:
FabricCapacityMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize AvgCU = avg(CUConsumption), MaxCU = max(CUConsumption) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

tiles.title: Data Quality Score by Entity
tiles.query:
dq.Results
| where CreatedDate > ago(24h)
| summarize AvgFailureRate = avg(FailureRate) by RuleName
| extend QualityScore = round(100 - AvgFailureRate, 2)

tiles.title: Active Alerts
tiles.query:
DataActivatorAlerts
| where Status == 'Active'
| summarize Count = count() by Severity

tiles.title: Real-Time Sales (5-min)
tiles.query:
GoldEventhouse.RealTimeSalesKPI
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize Revenue = sum(TotalRevenue) by bin(Timestamp, 5m)
